constraints_1_content: Before writing any reconciliation script, run `ls -la /app/data/in/` in the terminal and then `head -5` on at least one orders CSV, one payments JSONL, and one refunds JSONL (if present) to observe real field names, quoting styles, and timestamp formats before assuming anything about the data.
constraints_1_rationale: This constraint is specific to the task's input file types and paths, and it relies on terminal shell commands in the Terminus2Agent tmux environment.
constraints_2_content: Check whether `/app/out` exists before executing the solution script; if absent, create it with `mkdir -p /app/out` so that subsequent write operations do not fail silently.
constraints_2_rationale: Specific to the task's output directory path and relies on executing shell commands in the tmux terminal.
constraints_3_content: After the script finishes, verify each of the six output files by running `head -3 <file>` and `wc -l <file>` in the terminal. Confirm headers are present and row counts are non-negative before setting task_complete.
constraints_3_rationale: Specific to the task's six required outputs; verification uses shell commands in the Terminus2Agent tmux terminal.
